'''Agapos the Ninth''' or '''Agapos IX''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sunesi]] and the ninth of the [[Priest-Prince]]s of [[Monor II]]. He ascended to the throne after his [[Parent/Legends|father]] [[Agapos the Eighth]]. Agapos was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and a follower of [[Maker/Legends|The Maker]]. He believed that his powers in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] were given to him by the Maker. Agapos was a vocal critic of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], criticizing their mining of [[cirrifog]]. The Empire put a [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] on Agapos for his comments, and he was forced into hiding to avoid [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="Only Droids" />

Eventually, Agapos was found by the bounty hunters [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] and [[Chenlambec]]. Chen was secretly working against the Empire and decided to smuggle Agapos off of Monor II. Chen deposited the fugitive on ''[[Tekra Point]]'' where he continued his musings in [[Philosopher/Legends|philosophy]]. Agapos's [[Writing/Legends|writings]] became very popular with the worlds within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Eventually, [[Daye Azur-Jamin]] tracked Agapos to ''Tekra Point'' to question the whereabouts of his lost love, Tinian.<ref name="Only Droids" />

Agapos eventually stepped down as Priest-Prince of Monor II so that his son, [[Agapos the Tenth]], could take the position.<ref name="Only Droids" />
